methodology: 20260511 returns are labels; shadow buckets use only data visible by 20260508 close. Research only, no active params changed.

shadow_rule_v0.existing_cpb_pick: Was already selected by CPB on 20260508 for 20260511 execution.
shadow_rule_v0.trend_extension_shadow: Entry price >=10, prior runup >18%, near 20d high, constructive prior volume. Intended to study strong-trend continuation misses.
shadow_rule_v0.breakout_pressure_shadow: Near 20d high with constructive prior volume and no severe 5d weakness. Intended to study pressure-before-breakout misses.
shadow_rule_v0.low_price_momentum_shadow: Entry price <10. Kept separate because active CPB filters these out for risk control.
shadow_rule_v0.overheated_breakout_watch: Near high but prior-day volume already >2x MA10; watch only, likely high risk.

recommended_next_steps: Create a shadow-only strong-trend/volume-breakout evaluator and compare against cpb_6157 for at least 20 trading days.
Do not relax cpb_6157 max_entry_runup or price floor directly; it would mix pullback and breakout regimes.
Add evidence/sector confirmation before allowing any strong-trend candidate into paper picks.
Keep low-price momentum as a separate micro-sleeve with smaller sizing and stricter stops if researched.
